data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Technical issue protocol (lost connection)', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that the connection was lost and the candidate was able to rejoin, it does not provide specific details or endpoints that demonstrate how the protocol is implemented or verified. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the necessary evidence to confirm the protocol's existence and effectiveness is missing.
gaps: No evidence of a defined technical issue protocol for lost connection scenarios.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define technical issue protocol endpoint
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify the implementation of the protocol for handling lost connections.
